# Finding Template

## Record identity
- Finding ID (UUID):
- Entity ID (UUID):
- Record type:
- Status:
- Finding type: field finding | observation | measurement | experiment | clinical result | dataset result | document finding | inference support
- Domain context:

## What was found / observed
- Material or object:
- Description:
- Quantity:
- Condition:
- Identification confidence:

## Measurement / observation
Use this section for astronomy, physics, chemistry, medicine, technology, and other measured observations.

- Method:
- Instrumentation:
- Measured property/properties:
- Unit(s):
- Result summary:
- Uncertainty:
- Repeatability:
- Notes:

## Experiment / study
Use this section for lab experiments, quantum technology tests, medical studies, engineering tests, and similar controlled investigations.

- Study type:
- Protocol:
- Sample size:
- Controls:
- Variables:
- Outcome measure(s):
- Ethical / regulatory notes:

- Coordinates:

- Country:

- Observatory / laboratory / institution:
- Context / layer:

- Notes:

- Notes:
